'''Dirk Harkness''' was an independent [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] operative from [[Salliche/Legends|Salliche]]. He wore an [[Eye patch/Legends|eye patch]] over his left [[Eye/Legends|eye]].

==Biography==
Dirk Harkness was born on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Salliche/Legends|Salliche]] in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]]. After graduating from a technical school, he joined a private shipping corporation as an apprentice [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], at the age of twenty, he was [[Chief engineer/Legends|Chief Engineer]] aboard the ''[[Colders Watch]]'', a [[Bulk freighter/Legends|bulk freighter]] under the command of [[Captain]] [[Beezrul Granf]]. He was involved in a relationship with the ship's [[First Mate/Legends|First Mate]], [[Chessa Dohhenty]]; the two dreamed of settling down and sharing a peaceful life. Unbeknownst to Harkess, Dohhenty was also an agent of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. During a stop on the planet [[Kelada/Legends|Kelada]], a squad of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] confronted Dohhenty as she was unloading a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggled]] cargo of [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] weaponry. Dohhenty opened fire on the stormtroopers, and they responded in kind, [[Death|killing]] her. Harkness grabbed a blaster and began firing before fleeing the [[Hangar|docking bay]]. He stumbled into [[Lorana's Labyrinth]], where he met Dohhenty's Alliance contacts, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Halomar Corros]] and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Tony Franco]]. They recruited him in the Alliance.<ref name="CD" />

Harkness initially worked as a mechanic at [[Reginard Base]], but he was restless and wanted revenge on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He soon left the base to kill Imperial [[Officer/Legends|officers]] and [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomats]], but eventually rejoined the Alliance in [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Intelligence]] and commanded several intelligence missions. At the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], he was assigned as Chief Engineer on a [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]]. Following [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], Harkness was assigned to the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] with the commissioned [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]]. His tenure with the New Republic Intelligence Service lasted only a few [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] before he resigned. Harkness organized several associates—including [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]], [[Tru'eb Cholakk]], [[Jai Raventhorn]], and [[Starter]]—formed the [[Black Curs]], a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] group considered to be friendly to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The unit carried out intelligence and commando missions against the retreating Empire; during a failed mission, Harkness was injured in an explosion which blinded him in his left [[Eye/Legends|eye]] and left him with scars on his chest and arm.<ref name="CD" />

After taking command of the [[Battle of Yavin (starship)|''Battle of Yavin'']], he and his men were [[Rout of Hensara|rescued]] from [[Hensara III]] by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]].

Shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] Harkness had been working with [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] when he was captured by Imperial forces and imprisoned on [[Zelos II]]. Okeefe and [[Tru'eb Cholakk]] managed to rescue him.

At some point following after the Battle of Endor, Harkness and the Curs journeyed through the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] and wrote up an extensive report which they directed to Alliance High Command. It was generally well received though it was found to be lacking information on ground forces and army deployment on the worlds, though fleet deployment was well documented and comprehensive. The report mentioned the arrival of an Imperial fleet under Admiral [[Roek]] in the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]]. The [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Borsk Fey'lya]] criticized the accuracy of Harkness' report. However, Admiral [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] read Harkness's report and agreed with him, saying that the [[New Republic Defense Fleet|New Republic's fleet]] did not have enough ships to capture Corellia or Kuat.<ref name="Recon & Report: The Journey to Coruscant">{{JournalCite|2|Recon & Report: The Journey to Coruscant}}</ref>

In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], Harkness was present in the [[Gorkin's Rest]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]]<ref name="CD" /> on [[Wroona/Legends|Wroona]]<ref name="ED">{{JournalCite|3|Explosive Developments}}</ref> with other members of the Black Curs. He recounted the tale of how Dohhenty was killed and how he joined the Alliance.<ref name="CD" />

==Personality and traits==
Dirk Harkness was two [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall with a brooding, cold stare. As a young man, he was optimistic and dreamed of a carefree life with someone he loved. His entire personality shifted with the death of his lover, Chessa Dohhenty, at the hands of the Empire. He was subdued and unfriendly, and only trusted a handful of close friends. Harkness had little tolerance for any kind of [[Droid/Legends|droid]].<ref name="CD" />

==Skills and abilities==
Harkness was a skilled engineer, capable of serving as chief engineer on both a bulk freighter and a military-grade capital ship. After joining the Alliance, Harkness became skilled in many combat techniques.<ref name="CD" />

==Equipment==
As an engineer, Harkness only carried a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] and a [[Hydrospanner/Legends|hydrospanner]]. As of 7 ABY, Harkness carried a [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blaster pistol]] and [[Knife/Legends|knife]].<ref name="CD" />
